meaning: vt.使过度紧张,使工作过度vi.过度紧张n.过度紧张,过劳
examples: The distance of the gap needs to be between the outer limits of boredom and overstrain according to Iser.
Most muscle and spinal injuries are from overstrain.
Both endopathic factors and exopathic factors might cause fatigue, but overstrain was the main etiology.
